record_accessed.subject: Your medical record was accessed
record_accessed.body: Your medical record (ID: {resourceId}) was accessed by {actorId} on {timestamp}.

access_granted.subject: Access granted to your record
access_granted.body: Access to your medical record (ID: {resourceId}) has been granted to {actorId}.

access_revoked.subject: Access revoked from your record
access_revoked.body: Access to your medical record (ID: {resourceId}) has been revoked from {actorId}.

record_uploaded.subject: New medical record uploaded
record_uploaded.body: A new medical record (ID: {resourceId}) has been uploaded by {actorId}.

emergency_access.subject: Emergency access to your record
emergency_access.body: Emergency access to your medical record (ID: {resourceId}) was initiated by {actorId} on {timestamp}.
